MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Vishnu Shah dba Auburn Hotel is present.
Attorney Howard Olsen appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Matthew Burke and Monique Ferrari are present.
Attorney Megan Keifer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. Counsels and litigants also confer with Judge Quidachay

This case did NOT settle. A settlement agreement will remain on the table for 24 hours. Parties to report to D501 by 4PM on JUN-14-2012 whether case has settled. The trial date of JUN-18-2012 remains on calendar.
